prompt: {"type":"anime storyboard collage","style":"high-quality polished anime illustration, cinematic lighting, soft bloom, dynamic motion, expressive character acting","subject":{"main character":{"description":"a petite schoolgirl angel with large glowing white feathered wings, very long wavy white hair with a small side braid, fair skin, blue eyes, wearing a blue basketball practice bib over a white gym T-shirt and navy gym shorts"},"supporting characters":{"count":5,"description":"other middle-school girls in a school gym, mostly wearing red practice bibs over white gym shirts and navy shorts, reacting as opponents or teammates"}},"setting":{"location":"Japanese indoor school gymnasium","details":["tall wooden wall panels","large sunlit windows","glossy hardwood court","basketball hoop and backboard","warm afternoon light streaming inside"]},"layout":{"composition":"2x2 four-panel storyboard sheet","panels":[{"position":"top-left","count":1,"scene":"the winged girl receives or reaches for a basketball during play, viewed at court level with another dark-haired girl in a blue bib in the left foreground and three red-bib players around them","camera":"dynamic medium-wide shot","effects":["ball suspended midair","backlit glowing wings","sports action motion"]},{"position":"top-right","count":1,"scene":"the angel girl launches into the air with wings spread wide, holding a basketball in one hand as she flies toward the hoop while three girls below stare up in shock","camera":"dramatic low-angle action shot","effects":["bright rim light through feathers","sense of lift and speed","floating hair and limbs"]},{"position":"bottom-left","count":1,"scene":"close-up low-angle dunk at the rim, the winged girl forcefully slams the basketball through the hoop","camera":"extreme dynamic low-angle near the backboard","effects":["net deformation","sparkling light particles","wings filling the frame","spectators' hands raised from below"]},{"position":"bottom-right","count":1,"scene":"super-deformed comedic aftermath: the angel girl stands smugly with arms crossed and puffed cheeks while four other girls angrily complain around her","camera":"frontal chibi group shot","effects":["orange-yellow manga burst background","comic anger marks and steam puffs","exaggerated yelling expressions"]}]},"character consistency":{"main outfit pieces":["blue practice bib","white short-sleeve gym shirt","navy gym bloomers or shorts","light athletic sneakers"],"main hair features":["very long white hair","loose waves","small braid near the front"],"main wing features":["two large luminous white feathered wings"]},"prompt":"Create a {argument name=\"panel count\" default=\"4\"}-panel anime storyboard collage showing {argument name=\"character concept\" default=\"a white-haired angel schoolgirl dominating a basketball game\"}. Keep the same main character in every panel: a petite girl with {argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"white\"} hair, huge glowing feathered wings, and a {argument name=\"uniform color\" default=\"blue\"} basketball practice bib in a sunlit Japanese school gym. Panel 1: action pass/reception scene with multiple opposing girls in red bibs. Panel 2: airborne leap toward the basket, dramatic low angle, wings fully extended. Panel 3: powerful dunk seen from below near the hoop, sparkling impact, dynamic rim and net. Panel 4: chibi comedy reaction panel with the angel girl smug and arms crossed while 4 angry girls yell around her. Use {argument name=\"art style\" default=\"cinematic polished anime with soft bloom and energetic sports motion\"}."}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"动漫项目拼贴","style":"高质量精致动漫插画，电影级光效，柔和光晕，动态感，生动的角色表演","subject":{"main character":{"description":"一位娇小的天使女学生，长着巨大的发光白色羽翼，留着非常长的波浪形白发，侧边有一条小辫子，皮肤白皙，蓝色眼睛，身穿蓝色篮球训练背心，内搭白色运动 T 恤和深蓝色运动短裤"},"supporting characters":{"count":5,"description":"学校体育馆里的其他初中女生，大多身穿红色训练背心，内搭白色运动衫和深蓝色短裤，作为对手或队友做出反应"}},"setting":{"location":"日本室内学校体育馆","details":["高大的木质墙板","大型阳光充足的窗户","光亮的硬木球场","篮球架和篮板","温暖的午后阳光射入室内"]},"layout":{"composition":"2x2 四格项目页","panels":[{"position":"左上","count":1,"scene":"长翅膀的女孩在比赛中接球或伸手去接球，从球场视角拍摄，左前景有一名身穿蓝色背心的黑发女孩，周围有三名身穿红色背心的球员","camera":"动态中远景","effects":["球悬在半空","背光发光的翅膀","体育动作感"]},{"position":"右上","count":1,"scene":"天使女孩展开双翼跃向空中，单手持球飞向篮筐，下方三名女孩抬头惊愕地看着她","camera":"戏剧性的低角度动作镜头","effects":["穿过羽毛的明亮轮廓光","升空感和速度感","飘动的头发和四肢"]},{"position":"左下","count":1,"scene":"篮筐处的特写低角度扣篮，天使女孩用力将篮球扣入篮筐","camera":"篮板附近的极端动态低角度镜头","effects":["篮网变形","闪烁的光粒子","翅膀填满画面","下方观众举起的手"]},{"position":"右下","count":1,"scene":"Q 版喜剧式结局：天使女孩双手交叉、鼓起脸颊，一脸得意地站着，周围四个女孩愤怒地向她抱怨","camera":"正面 Q 版群像镜头","effects":["橙黄色漫画爆发背景","漫画式的愤怒符号和蒸汽团","夸张的叫喊表情"]}]},"character consistency":{"main outfit pieces":["蓝色训练背心","白色短袖运动衫","深蓝色运动灯笼裤或短裤","轻便运动鞋"],"main hair features":["非常长的白发","松散的波浪","前额附近的小辫子"],"main wing features":["两只巨大的发光白色羽翼"]},"prompt":"创建一个 {argument name=\"panel count\" default=\"4\"} 格动漫项目拼贴，展示 {argument name=\"character concept\" default=\"一位白发天使女学生在篮球比赛中大显身手\"}。在每一格中保持主角一致：一位娇小的女孩，留着 {argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"白色\"} 头发，巨大的发光羽翼，身穿 {argument name=\"uniform color\" default=\"蓝色\"} 篮球训练背心，场景位于阳光明媚的日本学校体育馆。第 1 格：动作传球/接球场景，有多名身穿红色背心的对手女孩。第 2 格：跃向篮筐，戏剧性的低角度，翅膀完全展开。第 3 格：从篮筐附近的下方看到的强力扣篮，闪烁的冲击效果，动态的篮筐和篮网。第 4 格：Q 版喜剧反应格，天使女孩得意地双手交叉，周围 4 个愤怒的女孩在叫喊。使用 {argument name=\"art style\" default=\"电影级精致动漫，带有柔和光晕和充满活力的体育动作感\"}。"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 天使少女篮球项目：一套四格动漫项目，描绘了一位长着翅膀的女学生在篮球比赛中大显身手，适用于概念艺术、场景规划或视频生成关键帧。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, wide shot, 2x2]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, manga]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
